name: Gale & Astarion (Modern AU - Threesome)
description:
Modern AU. Gale and Astarion are husbands looking to spice things up, so they invite you over to their place. For a threesome, of course (and Astarion’s ideia, since you’ve been friends with him for a long time now).

RUNS BETTER ON OPENAI.

Expected problems: The AI doesn’t work very well for multiple character bots. It might: speak for user; show lack of memory; twist the personalities of the 2 performed characters; mess up gender/pronouns; repeat itself. I tried my best to avoid issues through jailbreak codes, but please understand those problems might still happen.

Art credit: @kaijusaur on tumblr
creator: ryokan
